profile: User lena.fischer@globex.example has performed 58 actions across 2 application(s): sap_concur_expense and sap_concur_travel. In sap_concur_expense they regularly create_expense_report (weekly, around 6-7 PM) and submit_expense_report (monthly, around 3-4 PM). In sap_concur_travel they regularly create_travel_request (weekly, around 6-7 PM). Across applications, create_travel_request in sap_concur_travel is usually followed by create_expense_report in sap_concur_expense (within 7 minutes, 100% of the time). By default, when performing create_expense_report they typically use suite=SAP Concur, module=Expense, and workflow=travel_to_expense; when performing create_travel_request they typically use suite=SAP Concur, module=Travel, and workflow=travel_to_expense; when performing submit_expense_report they typically use suite=SAP Concur and module=Expense.
